description: Per-service latency deep-dive — p50/p90/p95/p99 HTTP, Kafka listener, MongoDB write latency, retry-dispatcher scheduling, JVM heap/GC/threads/CPU, and service health/uptime.

panels.title: Services UP
panels.description: Count of services currently healthy (UP) across all 4 chrono-queue services.

panels.title: job-producer UP
panels.description: job-producer Prometheus scrape target UP status (1 = up, 0 = down).

panels.title: job-worker UP
panels.description: job-worker Prometheus scrape target UP status (1 = up, 0 = down).

panels.title: dlq-service UP
panels.description: dlq-service Prometheus scrape target UP status (1 = up, 0 = down).

panels.title: retry-dispatcher UP
panels.description: retry-dispatcher Prometheus scrape target UP status (1 = up, 0 = down).

panels.title: job-producer Uptime
panels.description: job-producer process uptime. Orange < 5 min (recently restarted), yellow < 1 h, green ≥ 1 h.

panels.title: job-worker Uptime
panels.description: job-worker process uptime. Orange < 5 min (recently restarted), yellow < 1 h, green ≥ 1 h.

panels.title: job-producer — p99 HTTP
panels.description: 99th percentile HTTP request latency for job-producer (excluding actuator endpoints).

panels.title: job-worker — p99 Kafka Listener
panels.description: 99th percentile Kafka listener processing latency for job-worker.

panels.title: dlq-service — p99 HTTP
panels.description: 99th percentile HTTP request latency for dlq-service (excluding actuator endpoints).

panels.title: retry-dispatcher — p99 Kafka Template
panels.description: 99th percentile Kafka template send latency for retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: dlq-service — p99 MongoDB Write
panels.description: 99th percentile MongoDB driver command latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: job-producer Request Rate
panels.description: Current HTTP request throughput (requests/second) for job-producer.

panels.title: Cross-Service p90 Latency Comparison
panels.description: Cross-service comparison of p90 latency for HTTP (job-producer, dlq-service), Kafka listener (job-worker, dlq-service), and Kafka template (retry-dispatcher).

panels.title: job-producer — HTTP Latency p50/p90/p95/p99 (all endpoints)
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP request latency for job-producer (all endpoints combined).

panels.title: job-producer — p50/p90/p99 per Endpoint
panels.description: Per-endpoint p50 / p90 / p99 HTTP latency for job-producer.

panels.title: job-producer — Request Rate by Endpoint
panels.description: HTTP request rate broken down by endpoint and HTTP method for job-producer.

panels.title: job-producer — Status Code Distribution
panels.description: HTTP response status code distribution for job-producer (bar gauge).

panels.title: job-worker — Kafka Listener p50/p90/p95/p99
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 Kafka listener processing latency for job-worker.

panels.title: job-worker — Consumer Lag & Throughput
panels.description: Kafka consumer lag (unread records) and records consumed per second for job-worker.

panels.title: dlq-service — HTTP Latency p50/p90/p95/p99
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 HTTP latency for dlq-service (all endpoints combined).

panels.title: dlq-service — MongoDB Write Latency p50/p90/p95/p99
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 MongoDB driver command latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: dlq-service — p50/p90/p99 per Endpoint
panels.description: Per-endpoint p50 / p90 / p99 HTTP latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: retry-dispatcher — Requeue Rate & Due Jobs
panels.description: retry-dispatcher requeue success rate, requeue failure rate, and due-job polling rate derived from Loki log queries.

panels.title: retry-dispatcher — Kafka Template Send Latency p50/p90/p95/p99
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 Kafka template send latency for retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: JVM Heap Used — All Services
panels.description: JVM heap memory used (bytes) per service.

panels.title: JVM Heap Used % — All Services

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(100 * sum by (application) (jvm_memory_used_bytes{application=~"job-producer|job-worker|retry-dispatcher|dlq-service", area="heap"}) / clamp_min(sum by (application) (jvm_memory_max_bytes{application=~"job-producer|job-worker|retry-dispatcher|dlq-service", area="heap"}), 1e-9), 0), 100)

panels.description: JVM heap used as a percentage of max heap per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Rate (pauses/s) — All Services
panels.description: JVM GC pause event rate (pauses per second) per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Latency p99 — All Services
panels.description: p99 JVM GC pause latency per service.

panels.title: JVM Live Threads — All Services
panels.description: JVM live thread count per service.

panels.title: Process CPU Usage — All Services
panels.description: JVM process CPU usage (0–1 mapped to 0–100 %) per service.

panels.title: System CPU Usage
panels.description: System CPU usage (0–1 mapped to 0–100 %) per service.

panels.title: JVM Non-Heap Memory Used
panels.description: JVM non-heap memory used (bytes) per service.

panels.title: JVM Classes Loaded
panels.description: JVM loaded classes count per service.

panels.title: JVM Daemon vs Total Threads
panels.description: JVM daemon and total live thread counts per service.

panels.title: Process Open File Descriptors
panels.description: Process open file descriptor count per service.
